steps.name: parser-prototype-asset-inventory
steps.summary: RLP1 added scripts/parser_prototype_asset_inventory.py, tests/test_parser_prototype_asset_inventory.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rlp1-parser-prototype-asset-inventory.md. It inventories 14 existing parser/runtime assets, confirms no missing required assets, and fixes RLP2~RLP5 gaps around local fixture adapter, deletion simulation, leak tests, and close gate.

steps.name: local-fixture-parser-adapter
steps.summary: RLP2 added LocalFixtureParserAdapterInput/Result plus run/validate/render helpers in kifrs/feedback/local_parser.py, exported them through kifrs.feedback, and added scripts/local_fixture_parser_adapter.py, tests/test_local_fixture_parser_adapter.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rlp2-local-fixture-parser-adapter.md. The adapter converts fixture-like structured candidates into contract-required facts and 5 review questions, routes to kifrs1116_review_pack, and rejects raw text/OCR/source excerpts/private embeddings.

steps.name: deletion-automation-simulation
steps.summary: RLP3 added scripts/deletion_automation_simulation.py, tests/test_deletion_automation_simulation.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rlp3-deletion-automation-simulation.md. It gates parser close on a simulated deleted_and_attested lifecycle, deletion before report write, no retained artifacts, and no claim of real filesystem deletion automation.

steps.name: private-payload-leak-tests
steps.summary: RLP4 added scripts/private_payload_leak_tests.py, tests/test_private_payload_leak_tests.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rlp4-private-payload-leak-tests.md. It scans RLP1-RLP3 public parser reports for identifier-like values, OCR payload markers, raw body markers, embedding-like vectors, and private absolute file paths; current leak count is 0.

steps.name: local-parser-prototype-close-gate
steps.summary: RLP5 added scripts/real_local_parser_prototype_close_gate.py, tests/test_real_local_parser_prototype_close_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-real-local-parser-prototype-close-report.md. It closes the horizon by tying RLP1 asset inventory, RLP2 fixture adapter, RLP3 deletion simulation, RLP4 leak tests, product trust close, and client-private runtime close; next horizon is source-body-ingestion-controlled-lane.
